authors.author: Andy Park
Andy Park
Niemand, als du Herr (Du allein stillst meine tiefste Sehnsucht)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are waters I have tasted Thinking just to drink and live But from a broken cistern With no life to give All this world can offer me Just will not satisfy Lord, lead me to the fountain Your presence pure divine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only You Lord, Only You Only You Lord, Only You You're the fountain I run to. Only You Lord, Only You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In his presence there is healing For body soul and mind He strengthened my weakness All in Him I find From this lifestream Flows a power The secret lies within To drink up once when tasted Never thirst again.
